requirement: Every unlocked target needs a reproducible source manifest or deterministic generator.
pass_condition: source is public or generated from committed code and records parameters
stop_condition: source cannot be regenerated or inspected

requirement: Source and target coordinates must be registered without using test labels.
pass_condition: coordinate mapping is exact, documented, or verified before local smoke
stop_condition: only independent-rescale or test-selected alignment is available

requirement: Local smoke must compare to simple and route-relevant baselines before any training scale-up.
pass_condition: mean/low-order, deterministic surrogate, and feature baselines are specified
stop_condition: candidate cannot be compared to a simpler baseline

requirement: Phase 98 may only unlock Phase 99 local smoke.
stop_condition: any route tries to open A100 before Phase 99 local smoke
